introSection: Sparetime Express is a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster located at NEB's Fun World in Oshawa, Ontario, Canada.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: While at Jeepers!, the train was snake themed with 5 cars. But at Neb's Funworld, the train has a wooden box-like theme with 4 cars. The track is painted black.

fullText:
Sparetime Express is a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster located at NEB's Fun World in Oshawa, Ontario, Canada.

While at Jeepers!, the train was snake themed with 5 cars. But at Neb's Funworld, the train has a wooden box-like theme with 4 cars. The track is painted black.
